requirement_topic.en: ERC Charging-Service Licensing and MEPSO Grid Project Review
requirement_topic.zh: ERC充电服务许可与MEPSO电网项目审查
requirement_topic.zht: ERC 充電服務許可與 MEPSO 電網專案審查

summary.en: North Macedonia regulates public charging-service market activity through ERC frameworks, including licensing routes, electronic transactions, charging automation, and market access controls. Grid-side installation and energisation can also involve MEPSO project approval and acceptance processes plus the relevant distribution company.
summary.zh: 北马其顿通过ERC框架监管公共充电服务市场活动，包括许可流程、电子许可交易、充电自动化流程及市场准入控制。电网侧安装和送电还可能涉及MEPSO项目审批与验收流程及相关配电公司。
summary.zht: 北馬其頓透過 ERC 框架監管公共充電服務市場活動，包括許可流程、電子許可交易、充電自動化流程及市場准入控制。電網側安裝與送電亦可能涉及 MEPSO 專案審批與驗收流程及相關配電公司。

standards_or_laws: North Macedonia charging and energy transformation regulation
EPDK-like licensing pattern in North Macedonia market practice
MEPSO project approval and acceptance processes

summary.en: China GB/T charger test reports and CCC or voluntary certification files address product conformity and do not replace a North Macedonia charging-network operator licence, automation interface process, MEPSO project approval, or local distribution-company energisation procedure.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T充电桩测试报告和CCC或自愿认证文件处理产品符合性，不能替代北马其顿充电网络运营商许可、自动化接口流程、MEPSO项目审批或当地配电公司送电程序。
summary.zht: 中國 GB/T 充電樁測試報告及 CCC 或自願認證檔案處理產品符合性，不能替代北馬其頓充電網路營運商許可、充電自動化介面流程、MEPSO 專案審批或當地配電公司送電程序。

standards_or_laws: China charger certification files where applicable

gap.en: Separate product readiness from service-operation readiness. The North Macedonia operator package may need licence-holder details, station registration data, backend integration, site electrical project documents, MEPSO correspondence, metering and tariff data, commissioning records, and local maintenance responsibilities.
gap.zh: 请将产品就绪与服务运营就绪分开。北马其顿站点运营包可能需要许可证持有人信息、站点登记数据、后台集成、现场电气项目文件、MEPSO往来文件、计量和资费数据、调试记录及本地维护责任。
gap.zht: 請將產品就緒與服務營運就緒分開處理。北馬其頓站點營運包可能需要許可證持有人資訊、站點登記資料、後台整合、現場電氣項目文件、MEPSO 往來文件、計量及資費資料、調試記錄與本地維護責任。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for entities carrying out licensed public charging-network operation where ERC charging-service rules apply; MEPSO and distribution-company review is mandatory where the site electrical project and grid-connection route requires it
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese product conformity files do not create North Macedonia charging-service, grid-connection, or operation rights

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A CE or GB/T product file does not authorise public charging-service operation in North Macedonia. Confirm the ERC licence holder, automation obligations, MEPSO project approval route, and distribution-company energisation steps for each site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CE或GB/T产品文件不会授权在北马其顿开展公共充电服务运营。每个站点都应确认 ERC 许可持有人、自动化义务、MEPSO 项目审批路径和配电公司送电步骤。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CE 或 GB/T 產品文件並不授權在北馬其頓進行公共充電服務營運。每個站點都應確認 ERC 許可持有人、Automation 義務、MEPSO 專案審批路徑和配電公司送電步驟。
